# AI FlowPal

AI FlowPal builds practical AI workflow systems for customer-facing operations.

Website: https://aiflowpal.com/
Contact: ashevchuk@aiflowpal.com

Key pages:
- https://aiflowpal.com/ ? homepage
- https://aiflowpal.com/ai-workflow-automation-for-small-business/ ? small business AI workflow automation
- https://aiflowpal.com/customer-follow-up-automation/ ? customer follow-up automation
- https://aiflowpal.com/ai-automation-consultant-toronto/ ? Toronto AI automation consulting
- https://aiflowpal.com/immigration-consultant-ai-workflow/ ? admin workflow support for immigration consultants
- https://aiflowpal.com/travel-agency-ai-workflow/ ? travel agency workflow support
- https://aiflowpal.com/real-estate-lead-follow-up-automation/ ? real estate lead follow-up automation

Guardrail: AI FlowPal focuses on workflow/admin support with human approval. It does not provide legal, immigration, medical, tax, insurance, travel, or financial advice.
